ddls:
CREATE TABLE "real_estate_professionals" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each professional */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the professional */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the professional (e.g., Military Spouse, Veteran) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the professional is located */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of real estate service (e.g., Real Estate Agents/ Broker) */,
  "mta_approved" TEXT /* MTA approval status of the professional */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the professional */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the professional */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the professional */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the professional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_estate_professionals_affiliation FOREIGN KEY ("affiliation") REFERENCES affiliations ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_estate_professionals_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_estate_professionals_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "affiliations" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliation */,
  "affiliation_name" TEXT /* Name of the affiliation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the affiliation */,
  "logo" TEXT /* Logo of the affiliation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state (e.g., Northeast, South) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specialties" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialty */,
  "specialty_name" TEXT /* Name of the specialty */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specialty */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category that this specialty belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_estate_professional_specialties" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* ID of the real estate professional */,
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specialty */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience in this specialty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_estate_professional_specialties_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES real_estate_professionals ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_estate_professional_specialties_specialty_id FOREIGN KEY ("specialty_id") REFERENCES specialties ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bases" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each base */,
  "base_name" TEXT /* Name of the base */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the base */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch of the military (e.g., Army, Navy, Air Force) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "base_cities" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "base_id" INTEGER /* ID of the military base */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nearby city */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between the base and the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_base_cities_base_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_id") REFERENCES bases ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_base_cities_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_estate_professional_bases" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* ID of the real estate professional */,
  "base_id" INTEGER /* ID of the military base */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience working with this base */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_estate_professional_bases_base_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_id") REFERENCES bases ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_estate_professional_bases_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES real_estate_professionals ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., military personnel, family member) */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the user (if military personnel) */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch of the military (if military personnel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* ID of the real estate professional being reviewed */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES real_estate_professionals ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_searches" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Text of the search query */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date the search was performed */,
  "search_results" TEXT /* Results of the search (e.g., IDs of professionals, bases, cities) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_searches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_bookmarks" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmark */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the bookmark */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* ID of the real estate professional being bookmarked */,
  "bookmark_date" TEXT /* Date the bookmark was created */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the bookmark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_bookmarks_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES real_estate_professionals ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_bookmarks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_estate_professional_ratings" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* ID of the real estate professional being rated */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the professional */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings the professional has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_estate_professional_ratings_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES real_estate_professionals ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_estate_professional_views" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* ID of the real estate professional being viewed */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views of the professional's profile */,
  "last_view_date" TEXT /* Date of the last view */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_estate_professional_views_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES real_estate_professionals ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the certification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_estate_professional_certifications" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* ID of the real estate professional */,
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the certification */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the certification was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the certification expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_estate_professional_certifications_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES real_estate_professionals ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_estate_professional_certifications_certification_id FOREIGN KEY ("certification_id") REFERENCES certifications ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_estate_professional_languages" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* ID of the real estate professional */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language spoken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_estate_professional_languages_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES real_estate_professionals ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_estate_professional_languages_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("id")
)
